founder_read_model.headline_message: Cohort closed under phase44_claim_narrowing_truthfulness: narrow claims document proxy limits operator closeout v1. Hold documented proxy limits until new named evidence or source registration.
what_changed: Scorecard bucket moved no_market_metadata_row_for_symbol → sector_field_blank_on_metadata_row (diagnostic precision; not sector_available increase).
Phase 42 digest changed across Phase 43 bracket (execution artifact; not standalone falsifier proof).
what_did_not_change: Filing blocker distribution unchanged at aggregate level for cohort.
No increase in sector_available; sector-informed falsification still unavailable.
gate_status and primary_block_category unchanged vs Phase 43 bracket.
Family outcome rollup signatures did not materially change.
current_uncertainties: Filing-public strict pick and sector stratification remain proxy- or blocker-limited for this fixture.
Sector moved from 'no row' to 'blank field' in taxonomy only; sector_available is still absent.
next_watchpoints: Any newly named filing or sector source/path distinct from Phase 43 bounded paths (see reopen protocol).
Scorecard movement in exact_public_ts_available or sector_available if a bounded retest is authorized later.

representative_pitch.top_level_pitch: Chief-of-staff read: the research engine holds a **closed, claim-narrowed** posture on the 8-row fixture cohort. Falsifier substrate remains proxy-limited; we are **not** reopening broad public-core work. Next step is to **hold** until a **named new source or path** (or other dispositive evidence) is registered under governance — not to infer urgency from older bundle recommendation strings.
representative_pitch.why_this_matters: This matters because promotion and external claims must track **Phase 44 authoritative truthfulness** and **Phase 45 canonical closeout**. Misreading legacy optimistic wording in Phase 43 bundles would overstate how much the last bounded pass improved falsifiers.
what_changed: Scorecard bucket moved no_market_metadata_row_for_symbol → sector_field_blank_on_metadata_row (diagnostic precision; not sector_available increase).
Phase 42 digest changed across Phase 43 bracket (execution artifact; not standalone falsifier proof).
representative_pitch.what_remains_unproven: Still unproven for this cohort: clean pre-signal filing-public picks at strict PIT, and sector-informed stratification — aggregate scorecards did not gain exact_public_ts_available or sector_available in the Phase 43 bracket.
representative_pitch.what_to_watch_next: Any newly named filing or sector source/path distinct from Phase 43 bounded paths (see reopen protocol).; Scorecard movement in exact_public_ts_available or sector_available if a bounded retest is authorized later.; hold_closeout_until_named_new_source_or_new_evidence_v1
representative_pitch.authoritative_rationale_excerpt: No material falsifier upgrade under Phase 44 rules; do not reopen broad substrate. Narrow claims, document proxy limits, and close out unless new evidence appears.

signal_filing_boundary_v1.supported_scope: Cohort-level statement that pre-signal filing-public strict pick remains proxy- or blocker-limited for the Phase 43 8-row fixture; bounded ingest did not increase exact_public_ts_available or filed-date-only usability in scorecard aggregates.
signal_filing_boundary_v1.unsupported_scope: Claims that filing-public falsifier quality materially improved for this cohort without exact_public_ts_available or accepted_at_missing_but_filed_date_only gains.
signal_filing_boundary_v1.reason: Filing distributions before/after: {'no_10k_10q_rows_for_cik': 7, 'only_post_signal_filings_available': 1} → {'no_10k_10q_rows_for_cik': 7, 'only_post_signal_filings_available': 1}. No aggregate filing falsifier upgrade; retry only with a newly named ingestion path.

issuer_sector_reporting_cadence_v1.supported_scope: Sector diagnosis refined: metadata row exists but sector field remains blank for all 8 rows; sector-informed stratification is still unavailable.
issuer_sector_reporting_cadence_v1.unsupported_scope: Sector-based falsification or sector_available-backed claims for this cohort without a new provider/path that populates sector.
issuer_sector_reporting_cadence_v1.reason: Sector distributions before/after: {'no_market_metadata_row_for_symbol': 8} → {'sector_field_blank_on_metadata_row': 8}. no_market_metadata_row → sector_field_blank is taxonomy precision only unless sector_available increases.

cohort_claim_limits.supported_scope: Proxy-limited falsifier substrate remains for this bounded cohort; broad public-core reopening is not justified by Phase 43 evidence.
cohort_claim_limits.unsupported_scope: Broad filing_index campaigns, broad metadata campaigns, or auto-promotion from Phase 43 alone.
cohort_claim_limits.reason: Phase 44 assessment: see per-family limits and retry_eligibility.

provenance.summary: Trace: Phase 45 canonical bundle records which Phase 43 fields were superseded; Phase 44 bundle holds provenance-separated audits. Drill-down `provenance` for paths.

future_reopen_protocol.max_scope_on_reopen: single_bounded_cohort_retest_one_shot; preserve 8-row fixture cap unless documented separate approval expands scope
future_reopen_protocol.reopen_decision_rule: Prospective: one bounded retest may be authorized when operator registers a concrete named source/path that is not a duplicate label of Phase 43 paths already used, and documents why it is materially different. Retrospective: Phase 44 `material_falsifier_improvement_observed` remains the success criterion after a pass. These layers are distinct: declaring a new path does not imply prior improvement.

distinction.observed_material_improvement: After a bounded pass, Phase 44-style scorecard/gate/discrimination checks determine whether falsifier usability actually improved.
distinction.reopen_eligibility_on_new_named_source: Before the next pass, operator may register a new named path to satisfy governance for a single capped retest without requiring improvement to have been observed yet.

current_closeout_status.summary: Cohort closed under Phase 44 verdict; no further bounded work until named new source/path or other new evidence is registered per reopen protocol.

entry_fields.alert_class: str — taxonomy e.g. closeout_hold, reopen_eligible, gate_deferred
entry_fields.triggering_source_artifact: str — path or bundle phase key

decision_trace_ledger_schema.description: Founder/operator decision trace — why, not only what the engine said

entry_fields.outcome_placeholder: optional str for future outcome linkage

asset_list_cards.description: Scrollable list of tracked cohort rows or aggregate cohort card

asset_detail_cards.description: Tabs or accordion: decision, message, information, research, closeout

drilldown_panels.description: Each panel keyed by layer name; content from drilldown.render_drilldown

alert_feed.description: Chronological alert_ledger entries; filter by asset_id, status

decision_ledger_feed.description: Chronological decision_trace entries with linked artifacts

phase47.rationale: Consume the Phase 46 UI surface contract in a thin web or ops dashboard: alert feed, decision trace, drill-down panels, and optional notifications — still governed by bundles, no new substrate work.
